name: Retail Investors (India Steel Sector)
description: Aggregate representation of Indian retail investors holding steel sector equities. High sentiment sensitivity with incomplete information and strong herd behavior.
objectives: Preserve capital during market downturns and sector-specific shocks
Achieve long-term wealth creation aligned with India growth story
Follow institutional investor signals to time entry and exit
Avoid permanent capital loss from bankruptcy or fraud events
constraints: Limited access to management and sell-side analyst research
Behavioral biases amplify panic selling during negative news flow
Transaction costs and taxes penalize high-frequency trading strategies
Lack of diversification increases concentration risk in steel holdings
